headline: JetBlue Launches Italy Service With Boston-Milan Flights
summary: JBLU launches nonstop Boston-Milan service, expanding its European reach and targeting premium travelers with Mint cabins and low fares.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks That Fall Short
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.
